acceptedIds: Arkansas driver's license or ID card
Student photo ID from Arkansas public college or university
exceptions: Voters without ID may sign a provisional ballot affidavit; ballot counted if signature matches and affidavit verified.
provisionalBallotRules: Voter must return with ID or sign affidavit. Ballot canvassed after election.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Cell phones must be silenced; photography of ballot prohibited.
